sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70052" key="*neilwi/+s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Νειλ-ωΐς</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ΐδος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n70052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">situated on the Nile,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πυραμίδες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.710</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
